# ebay-mcp

> Local MCP server that exposes 322 tools covering 100% of the eBay Sell APIs to AI coding assistants (Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP-compatible client). Runs entirely on your machine — no cloud relay.

Built with TypeScript/Node.js. Supports OAuth 2.0 and eBay Trading API (legacy XML). Configurable via `.env` or an interactive setup wizard.

## Getting Started

- [README](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/README.md): Full setup guide, configuration reference, and usage examples
- [.env.example](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/.env.example): All supported environment variables with descriptions
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to add tools, run tests, and open PRs
- [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Full version history

## API Coverage

- [Account](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/src/tools/definitions/account.ts): Business policies, fulfillment, payment, return policies, privileges
- [Inventory](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/src/tools/definitions/inventory.ts): Listings, offers, inventory items, inventory item groups, bulk operations
- [Marketing](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/src/tools/definitions/marketing.ts): Promotions, campaigns, ads, reports
- [Fulfillment](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/src/tools/definitions/fulfillment.ts): Orders, payments, shipping, returns
- [Analytics](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/src/tools/definitions/analytics.ts): Seller standards, traffic reports, customer service metrics
- [Communication](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/src/tools/definitions/communication.ts): Buyer messages, notifications, message templates
- [Taxonomy](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/src/tools/definitions/taxonomy.ts): Category trees, item aspects, item conditions
- [Metadata](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/src/tools/definitions/metadata.ts): Return policies, sales tax jurisdictions, automotive compatibility
- [Developer](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/src/tools/definitions/developer.ts): Rate limits, signing keys, client registration
- [Trading](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/src/tools/definitions/trading.ts): Legacy XML API — fixed-price listing management (create, revise, relist, end)
- [Token Management](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/src/tools/definitions/token-management.ts): OAuth token retrieval, refresh, and diagnostics

## Security & Compliance

- [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/SECURITY.md): Vulnerability reporting and security policy
- [EBAY_COMPLIANCE.md](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/EBAY_COMPLIANCE.md): eBay API terms compliance notes
- [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md): Community standards

## Optional

- [API_STATUS.md](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/docs/API_STATUS.md): Live eBay API endpoint health snapshot (auto-updated weekly)
- [Docker](https://github.com/YosefHayim/ebay-mcp/blob/main/Dockerfile): Container setup for running the server
